channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: LifeCare Hospital Eldoret Staff Protest Over Pay Disparities and Working Conditions
item.description: Medical workers at LifeCare Hospital in Eldoret staged demonstrations outside the facility on May 25, accusing the hospital management of poor working conditions, understaffing, delayed statutory remi...

item.title: US strikes target Iranian mine-laying vessels in Strait of Hormuz conflict
item.description: The article examines the United States’ renewed military strikes against Iran, focusing on Iranian boats accused of laying naval mines in the Strait of Hormuz. According to US Central Command, America...

item.title: Alex Eala exits French Open first round after straight-sets loss to Iva Jovic
item.description: Filipino tennis player Alex Eala suffered another early exit at the French Open, falling in the first round of the 2026 tournament after a straight-sets defeat to her close friend and occasional doubl...

item.title: Federal Court Rules Alabama's 2023 Congressional Map Intentionally Discriminatory, Orders Use of Court-Drawn Plan
item.description: A federal three-judge panel has blocked Alabama from implementing its 2023 congressional redistricting plan, determining that it intentionally dilutes Black voters' electoral power. In a detailed 102-...

item.title: Pakistan urges India to uphold Indus Water Treaty at international water conference
item.description: Federal Minister for Climate Change and Environmental Coordination Musadik Malik raised Pakistan’s concerns over India’s handling of shared water resources during the fourth international conference o...

item.title: Analyst says U.S.–Iran negotiations falter amid inability to enforce Israeli compliance
item.description: A political analysis published by Raw Story argues that ongoing negotiations involving the United States, Iran, and regional actors are increasingly unstable due to leadership dynamics and regional mi...

item.title: Pakistani opposition rejects Trump’s call to expand Abraham Accords, seeks parliamentary debate
item.description: Pakistan’s opposition parties have strongly rejected former US President Donald Trump’s demand for Muslim countries, including Pakistan, to join the Abraham Accords with Israel as part of broader nego...

item.title: Federal judges and grand juries raise concerns over prosecutorial misconduct in DOJ cases
item.description: The article reports growing judicial and procedural challenges facing the U.S. Department of Justice in recent grand jury proceedings, with multiple federal judges and juries pushing back against alle...

item.title: Controversy grows over proposed Trump triumphal arch near Arlington National Cemetery amid veteran opposition
item.description: The article reports on growing controversy surrounding a Trump administration proposal to construct a massive triumphal arch near Arlington National Cemetery, a project that has triggered strong oppos...

item.title: White House responds sharply to CNN report on President Trump's age and health concerns
item.description: The White House issued a forceful and highly critical response after CNN published a report examining President Donald Trump’s age, health, and mortality considerations. The report, written by CNN jou...

item.title: Cardiologist Raises Concerns About Trump's Sleep Issues and Overall Health Ahead of Medical Checkup
item.description: A Raw Story report highlights comments made by Dr. Jonathan Reiner, a cardiologist and former physician to Vice President Dick Cheney, regarding President Donald Trump’s health ahead of a scheduled me...

item.title: Republican voter approval of Trump declines sharply on inflation and gas prices, polling shows
item.description: A recent analysis highlighted a notable decline in President Donald Trump’s approval ratings among Republican voters, particularly regarding key economic issues such as inflation and gas prices. Accor...

item.title: Sindh Health Department strengthens Ebola screening and emergency preparedness at Karachi airport
item.description: The Sindh Health Department has stepped up Ebola prevention and monitoring arrangements at Karachi’s Jinnah International Airport due to rising global concern over the spread of the virus. A high-leve...

item.title: Health Benefits of Raw, Local Honey as a Natural Alternative to Supplements
item.description: In a world filled with expensive wellness supplements promising everything from better skin to improved mood, raw honey stands out as a natural, accessible option with genuine health potential. Unlike...

item.title: OutKick’s Joe Kinsey Recaps Memorial Day Sports, Golf, Grilling, and Reader Commentary
item.description: This OutKick “Screencaps” column by Joe Kinsey mixes sports commentary, lifestyle observations, and reader submissions during the Memorial Day holiday weekend. The main focus is on Emily Tanner, girlf...

item.title: Georgia primary ballot selection shows Democratic turnout ahead of Republicans for first time in decades
item.description: In Georgia’s most recent primary election, voters selecting Democratic ballots outnumbered those choosing Republican ballots by a notable margin, marking the largest gap in favor of Democrats in rough...

item.title: Filip Hrgovic defeats Dave Allen in three rounds, lines up potential fight with Moses Itauma
item.description: Croatian heavyweight boxer Filip Hrgovic put on a dominant performance when he stopped Dave Allen inside three rounds at the Eco-Power Stadium in Doncaster on May 16. From the first bell, Hrgovic cont...

item.title: Trump Shares Series of Truth Social Posts Before Scheduled Walter Reed Medical Visit
item.description: President Donald Trump made a rapid series of 19 posts on his Truth Social platform early Tuesday morning before departing for Walter Reed National Military Medical Center for what the White House des...

item.title: Trump’s Proposed $1.8 Billion Fund Sparks Divisions Within Republican Party
item.description: A report published by Raw Story examines growing tensions within the Republican Party following Donald Trump’s proposal for a $1.8 billion fund intended to compensate allies who claim they were unfair...

item.title: Veteran journalist Baldwin Ndaba honoured for fearless reporting and mentorship
item.description: South Africa’s journalism community has paid tribute to veteran political reporter Baldwin Ndaba following his death on 23 May 2026. Colleagues, editors, politicians and former newsroom peers remember...
